concentration_warnings: tracked + seed entries represent 43.3% of universe (65/150), above the 20% guideline. This is structural given the 57 already-analyzed tickers. All 14 source buckets are populated and sector curated lists are well-represented.
Technology sector is 30% of universe (45/150) — high but reflects pipeline focus on quality compounders with tech/software moats.
US geography is 80.7% of universe (121/150). Europe at 16.7% (25 names). Limited Asia/Canada representation.

priority_high: post_earnings|52wk_low|52wk_high|fcf_roic in source_bucket AND mkt_cap_tier in {mega,large}
priority_medium: any curated sector bucket in source_bucket (no high trigger)
triage_yes: already_analyzed=false AND priority=high AND confidence in {high,medium}
triage_maybe: priority=high but no fresh event catalyst
